prompt: Add crawl-space foundation type with JSON params, geometry rules, draw_crawl_space_foundation pseudocode using draw_box/subtract_intervals, and BIM attribution.

assertions.text: New JSON params defined including crawl space height, vent width, vent height, and vent spacing fields
draw_box called for each wall segment between vent cutouts (not one monolithic box)
subtract_intervals used to compute wall segments with vent openings removed
Vent vertical position: 4 inches above bottom of stem wall (z_off + 4), not at top or bottom
apply_bim_data called with 'Footing' type and Concrete material for BIM attribution
Foundation height calculation updated: crawl space height contributes to the Z offset used by walls above
